title: silene drummondii subsp. striata
intro: Silene drummondii subsp. striata, also known as Drummond's catchfly, is a plant species belonging to the carnation family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Silene drummondii subsp. striata include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory ailments.
